usage: specifyBlackBox [-help] [-coreSpacing {left right top bottom}] [-minPitchBottom <integer>] [-minPitchLeft <integer>] [-minPitchRight <integer>] [-minPitchTop <integer>] [-noRebuildTiming] [-pinLayerBottom {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerLeft {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerRight {list_of_layers}] [-pinLayerTop {list_of_layers}] [-placementHalo {left  right top bottom }] [-reservedLayer {list_of_layers}] [-routingHalo <float>] [-routingHaloBottomLayer <integer>] [-routingHaloTopLayer <integer>] { -cell <string> | -masterInst <string> } [-size {x y} | -area <float> | -gateCount <string> | {-gateArea <float>[ -cellUtil <float> ][ -includeMacroArea {0 1} {-macroArea <float> | -macroList {macroName [count]}}]}] [{-area <float> | -gateCount <string>}[ -minWidth <float> | -minHeight <float> | -fixedWidth <float> | -fixedHeight <float> ]] [ -minWidth <float> | -minHeight <float> | -fixedWidth <float> | -fixedHeight <float>  | -aspectRatioRange {min max} ] [ -aspectRatio <float> | -aspectRatioRange {min max} ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies the total area in square micrometers.

options.name: -aspectRatio
options.description: Specifies the aspect ratio of the specified module.

options.name: -aspectRatioRange
options.description: Specify the minimum and maximum values of the aspect ratio

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies name of the partition, wildcard can be specified

options.name: -cellUtil
options.description: Specifies the cell utilization. This value is used to derive the area of the blackbox.

options.name: -coreSpacing
options.description: Specifies the space,in micrometers,between the module boundary & core design area of the module on the left, right, top & bottom sides.

options.name: -fixedHeight
options.description: Specifies the minimum height of the specified module.

options.name: -fixedWidth
options.description: Specifies the fixed width of the specified module.

options.name: -gateArea
options.description: Specifies the gate area.

options.name: -gateCount
options.description: Specifies a gate count value. The total cell area is equal to the specified gate count multiplied by the specified area per gate.

options.name: -includeMacroArea
options.description: Specifies whether the gate area includes the macro area specified through the macroArea or the macroList parameter.

options.name: -macroArea
options.description: Specifies the total area of the macro(s) in square microns.

options.name: -macroList
options.description: Specifies the name(s) of the hard macro(s) whose area(s) will be included while calculating the total gate area.

options.name: -masterInst
options.description: Specifies the name of master instance.

options.name: -minHeight
options.description: Specifies the minimum height of the specified module.

options.name: -minPitchBottom
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Bottom blackbox side.

options.name: -minPitchLeft
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Left blackbox side.

options.name: -minPitchRight
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Right blackbox side.

options.name: -minPitchTop
options.description: Specifies the pin pitch dimension for the Top blackbox side.

options.name: -minWidth
options.description: Specifies the minimum width of the specified module.

options.name: -noRebuildTiming
options.description: Skips re-building the time graph and re-initializing the top cell information.

options.name: -pinLayerBottom
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the blackbox.

options.name: -pinLayerLeft
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the blackbox.

options.name: -pinLayerRight
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the blackbox.

options.name: -pinLayerTop
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to use for the blackbox.

options.name: -placementHalo
options.description: {left right top bottom } Specifies extra spacing, in micrometers around the sides of the blackbox that should not be used for placement.

options.name: -reservedLayer
options.description: Specifies the metal layers that are used for routing in the partition and generating partition pins.

options.name: -routingHalo
options.description: Specifies routing spacing, in micrometers, around the sides of the blackbox.

options.name: -routingHaloBottomLayer
options.description: Specifies the bottom partition layer for which routing halo will be created.

options.name: -routingHaloTopLayer
options.description: Specifies the top partition layer for which routing halo will be created.

options.name: -size
options.description: Specifies fixed width and height of a specified module, in micrometers
